sc.political.s: FEC data 2020-2024 shows donations split between Democratic and Republican candidates; no single party ≥70%.
sc.dei.s: PwC published DEI strategy 2020; HRC CEI score 100 (2023-2024); named DEI initiatives in hiring and advancement.
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement or named pollution events. Publishes GHG disclosures (Scopes 1-3); no third-party verification cited.
sc.labor.s: No public NLRB unfair labor findings or OSHA fatalities found. No named class-action labor lawsuits of note.
sc.charity.s: Philanthropy disclosures vague; no named program with public dollar amount ≥1% of revenue found.
sc.privacy.s: No documented HIBP breaches or FTC privacy enforcement actions found.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio not publicly disclosed; data unavailable.
